title: OnlyMacePlugin
description: Only Mace Plugin That Is Being Used In Rebirth SMP
body:
The *OneMaceOnly* plugin is designed to keep gameplay simple and balanced by ensuring that only **one Mace** can ever exist on a server at any given time ⚔️.

When a player *crafts* or *obtains* the first Mace (even through creative or commands), it is marked as the **unique Mace**. At that moment, the plugin sends a server-wide announcement with bold on-screen titles, chat messages, and fitting sound effects 🔔.

While the unique Mace exists, **no other mace** can be created. Any attempt to craft or spawn another is blocked or instantly removed, keeping the one-Mace rule intact.

If the unique Mace is ever **destroyed**—whether by breaking, burning, falling into the void, despawning, or any other cause—the plugin broadcasts its destruction with dramatic titles, chat, and sounds 🐉. From that point on, crafting is unlocked again and another Mace can be forged.

The plugin also accounts for special cases, such as a player logging out while holding the Mace. In this situation, it is *not* considered destroyed until it actually is, ensuring no false announcements.

In short, *OneMaceOnly* is a lightweight, reliable, and automatic solution for making the Mace a true one-of-a-kind legendary weapon on your server ✨.
